message:
refactor: deduplicate approval expiry logic and enforce ApproverList for all requests

Extract ensurePendingApproval(), expireIfNeeded(), and expireApproval()
helpers to eliminate four copies of the expire-update-publish-notify pattern
scattered across Check, Approve, Deny, ListPending, and ExpireStale.

expireApproval() now calls notifyWaiters() so that WaitForApproval callers
are woken immediately when an approval expires during a concurrent
Approve/Deny/Check call, fixing a subtle hang where waiters would block
until their own timeout even though the approval was already expired.

Move ApproverList enforcement before the SLB self-approval check in
Approve() and add the same guard to Deny(), so ApproverList restricts who
can act on any approval — not just SLB requests. The SLB self-approval
check still runs afterward for SLB-flagged requests.

Add 4 new tests:
- TestApproverListAppliesToNonSLB: verifies non-admin rejection and
  admin approval when ApproverList is set on a non-SLB request
- TestWaitForApprovalWakesWhenLateApproveExpiresRequest: verifies
  WaitForApproval unblocks when a late Approve() triggers expiry
- TestDenyExpiredRequestMarksExpired: verifies Deny on an expired
  request surfaces the expired status

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
